gcode_macro CANCEL_PRINT.description: Cancel sigur - park la home, motoare ON
gcode_macro CANCEL_PRINT.gcode:
SET_GCODE_OFFSET Z=0
M104 S0
M140 S0
M107

G91
G1 E-3 F1800
G90

{% set current_z = printer.toolhead.position.z %}
{% if current_z < 180 %}
G91
G1 Z20 F1500
G90
{% endif %}

G1 X0 Y0 F4000
G28


SET_GCODE_VARIABLE MACRO=_PAUSE_STATE VARIABLE=filament_changed VALUE=0

SET_GCODE_VARIABLE MACRO=PRINTER_STATE VARIABLE=print_mode VALUE='"IDLE"'

CANCEL_PRINT_BASE
RESPOND TYPE=command MSG="Print anulat. Cap parcat la home."

gcode_macro PAUSE.gcode:
SAVE_GCODE_STATE NAME=M600_state
PAUSE_BASE
{% set current_z = printer.toolhead.position.z %}


{% if current_z < 180 %}
G91
G1 Z20 F1500
G90
{% else %}
G1 Z{[current_z + 5, 200]|min} F1200
{% endif %}


G1 X0 Y-80 F6000


M104 S175



SET_GCODE_VARIABLE MACRO=PRINTER_STATE VARIABLE=print_mode VALUE='"PAUSED"'
RESPOND TYPE=command MSG="Pauza activa. Hotend la 175C, bed mentinut."

gcode_macro RESUME.description: Resume smart - load filament doar daca era M600
gcode_macro RESUME.gcode:
{% set is_change = printer["gcode_macro _PAUSE_STATE"].filament_changed %}
{% set saved_temp = printer.save_variables.variables.last_extruder_temp|default(215)|float %}


M109 S{saved_temp}

{% if is_change == 1 %}

{% set LOAD = params.LOAD|default(800)|float %}

G91
G1 E{LOAD} F800
G90


G91
G1 E50 F100
G4 P2000
G1 E-3 F2400
G90


G91
G1 Z2 F600
G90
G1 X20 Y-80 F8000


SET_GCODE_VARIABLE MACRO=_PAUSE_STATE VARIABLE=filament_changed VALUE=0
RESPOND TYPE=command MSG="Filament nou incarcat, continui print."
{% else %}

G91
G1 E1 F180
G90
RESPOND TYPE=command MSG="Resume print."
{% endif %}


SET_GCODE_VARIABLE MACRO=PRINTER_STATE VARIABLE=print_mode VALUE='"PRINTING"'


RESTORE_GCODE_STATE NAME=M600_state MOVE=1 MOVE_SPEED=50
RESUME_BASE

gcode_macro SET_PAUSE_NEXT_LAYER.description: Enable a pause if the next layer is reached

gcode_macro SET_PAUSE_AT_LAYER.description: Enable/disable a pause if a given layer number is reached

gcode_macro SET_PRINT_STATS_INFO.description: Overwrite, to get pause_next_layer and pause_at_layer feature

gcode_macro _TOOLHEAD_PARK_PAUSE_CANCEL.description: Helper: park toolhead used in PAUSE and CANCEL_PRINT

gcode_macro _CLIENT_EXTRUDE.description: Extrudes, if the extruder is hot enough

gcode_macro _CLIENT_RETRACT.description: Retracts, if the extruder is hot enough

gcode_macro _CLIENT_LINEAR_MOVE.description: Linear move with save and restore of the gcode state

gcode_macro START_PRINT.description: Start print universal - valori 100% din slicer

gcode_macro END_PRINT.description: Sfarsit print sigur - park la home, motoare ON
gcode_macro END_PRINT.gcode:
{% set current_z = printer.toolhead.position.z %}


M104 S0
M140 S0
M107


G91
G1 E-3 F1800
G90


{% if current_z < 180 %}
G91
G1 Z20 F1500
G90
{% endif %}


G1 X0 Y0 F4000


G28



SET_GCODE_VARIABLE MACRO=PRINTER_STATE VARIABLE=print_mode VALUE='"IDLE"'
RESPOND TYPE=command MSG="Print complet. Cap parcat la home."

gcode_macro M600.description: Schimb filament cu tranzitie temp + air purge

gcode_macro CHANGE_FILAMENT.description: Alias pentru M600 - suporta CHANGE_FILAMENT FILAMENT=PETG RETRACT=600

gcode_macro LOAD_FILAMENT.gcode:
{% set LOAD = params.LOAD|default(800)|float %}
{% set TEMP = params.TEMP|default(215)|float %}

M109 S{TEMP}
M83
G92 E0
G1 E{LOAD} F800
G1 E50 F100
G4 P2000
G1 E-3 F2400
M82
RESPOND TYPE=command MSG="Filament incarcat."

gcode_macro TEST_HOME_FROM_ANYWHERE.description: Test - dezhome fortat apoi G28 (verifica safe homing)
gcode_macro TEST_HOME_FROM_ANYWHERE.gcode:
M84
G4 P2000
RESPOND TYPE=command MSG="Muta capul manual oriunde. Apoi apela RESUME_TEST_HOME."

gcode_macro RESUME_TEST_HOME.description: Dupa TEST_HOME_FROM_ANYWHERE - testeaza G28 din pozitia curenta
gcode_macro RESUME_TEST_HOME.gcode:
G28
RESPOND TYPE=command MSG="G28 OK din pozitie arbitrara."

gcode_macro SHOW_FILAMENT_INFO.description: Afiseaza filament + PA + flow + fan curent (cerere manuala)

gcode_macro BLTOUCH_RECOVER.gcode:
BLTOUCH_DEBUG COMMAND=reset
G4 P1000
BLTOUCH_DEBUG COMMAND=pin_up
QUERY_PROBE

M107

G91
G1 E-3 F1800
G90

{% set current_z = printer.toolhead.position.z %}
{% if current_z < 180 %}

SET_GCODE_VARIABLE MACRO=_PAUSE_STATE VARIABLE=filament_changed VALUE=0

CANCEL_PRINT_BASE
